info.title: Temp staffing germany
info.description:
This is the API documentation of Temp Staffing Germany. It provides endpoints for accessing and managing resources related to Candidates, Employees, Companies, Time Management, and more.

#### Authentication

- **OAuth2**: Used for server-to-server authentication. Requires providing relevant scope to be embedded in the access token. All calls using client-credentials flow need to send an additional X-CUSTOMER-ID.
- **Reference Key**: Used by TSA partners to develop solutions against an individual customer. Can be revoked anytime via the [zvoove Hub](https://hub.zvoove.cloud/).

#### Scopes Information

| Scope         | Description                                                   |
| ------------- | -------------                                                 |
| api_gateway                 | Provides access to API Gateway endpoints        |
| api_gateway:all_customers   | Provides access to all customers                |
| unity_access:all            | Provides access to ErpDeApi service endpoints |

post.summary: Upload a candidate contact file or scan
post.description: Attaches one file or scan to an existing candidate contact (PERSKONT).

ContactId.description:
Personal contact (`PERSKONT.LFDNR`) the file or scan must be attached to.
Together with ErpDeApi.Contracts.CandidateContacts.Requests.UploadCandidateContactFileRequest.CandidateId forms the full PERSKONT primary key.

Description.description: Optional description (external document note or scan description).

CreatedAt.description: Optional creation timestamp. Defaults to now.

post.description: Creates a single contact for the candidate. Returns the new contact id.

put.summary: Update a candidate contact
put.description: Replaces all mutable fields on the specified candidate contact. Omitted reminderDate and per-reminder date values are set to the current Europe/Berlin time.

parameters.name: Statuses
parameters.description:
Filter by one or more candidate statuses. When omitted, defaults to active candidates (Applicant).
Allowed values: Applicant, CompletedApplicant.
Data consent is always validated regardless of the chosen status.

parameters.name: From
parameters.description: Oldest changelog date limit (no older than).

parameters.name: OnlyLatestPerCustomer
parameters.description: If true, return only the latest change per modified customer.

parameters.name: CustomerIds
parameters.description: Optional customer ids filter to include only changelog for provided ids.

parameters.name: LastId
parameters.description: Return only changelog entries with Id greater than this value (incremental sync).

parameters.name: OfficeIds
parameters.description: List of office IDs to filter the companies by.

parameters.name: CompanyGuids
parameters.description: List of company GUIDs to filter the companies by. When omitted, no GUID filter is applied.

parameters.name: Status
parameters.description:
Status of the companies to filter by. Prefer ErpDeApi.Contracts.Company.Requests.GetAllCompaniesOverviewV3PagedRequest.Statuses for new integrations;
this single-value parameter is kept for backwards compatibility.

parameters.name: Statuses
parameters.description:
One or more company statuses to filter by. When omitted, defaults to active companies.
Allowed values: InterestedCustomer (1), ActiveCustomer (2), InactiveCustomer (3),
CustomerBranch (4), CompletedInterestedCustomer (6), Supplier (9).
When both ErpDeApi.Contracts.Company.Requests.GetAllCompaniesOverviewV3PagedRequest.Status and ErpDeApi.Contracts.Company.Requests.GetAllCompaniesOverviewV3PagedRequest.Statuses are provided, only ErpDeApi.Contracts.Company.Requests.GetAllCompaniesOverviewV3PagedRequest.Statuses may be used.

parameters.name: Active
parameters.description: Is customer active or inactive. If not provided both active and inactive customers will be returned.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description:
Search term to filter the companies by name. This is a partial match aka. Containes.
So "Tree" will match "Super Tree GmbH".
Case insensitive.

get.summary: Get employees with profession and qualification details
get.description: Optimized employee search for filtering by profession and qualification. Returns all professions and qualifications for each employee. When an availability window (AvailableFrom/AvailableTo) is provided, employees who have any assignment or absence overlapping that window are excluded, regardless of which office the assignment's order belongs to. SearchTerm matches when the value appears in first name, last name, or employee ID (OR).

parameters.name: ProfessionId
parameters.description: Filter to employees who have this profession.

parameters.name: QualificationId
parameters.description:
Filter to employees who have this qualification for the given profession.
Only applied when ErpDeApi.Contracts.Employee.Requests.GetEmployeesWithDetailsV5PagedRequest.ProfessionId is also provided.

parameters.name: OfficeIds
parameters.description:
Filter employees by one or more branch office identifiers (the employee's home department).
This does not affect the availability check: an employee with an overlapping assignment is
excluded regardless of which office that assignment's order belongs to.

parameters.name: SearchTerm
parameters.description:
Search term to filter employees by first name, last name, or ID.
The search is case-insensitive and uses substring matching (%searchTerm%).
Any '%' or '_' characters are matched literally (they are not treated as wildcards).
Whitespace splits the value into tokens; an employee is included when ANY token matches ANY of
the three fields (OR across tokens, OR across fields).

parameters.name: Statuses
parameters.description:
Filter by one or more employee statuses. When omitted, defaults to active employees
(Employee and future employees with an entry date).
Allowed values: Employee, FormerEmployee, DormantEmployeeWithoutPayroll,
DormantEmployeeWithPayroll, Freelancer, FormerFreelancer.

parameters.name: AvailableFrom
parameters.description:
Start date of the availability window. When provided together with ErpDeApi.Contracts.Employee.Requests.GetEmployeesWithDetailsV5PagedRequest.AvailableTo,
employees who have any assignment or absence overlapping the window are excluded.
Absences are stored in the same assignment table (EINSPERS) and count as busy too.

parameters.name: AvailableTo
parameters.description:
End date of the availability window. Must be provided together with ErpDeApi.Contracts.Employee.Requests.GetEmployeesWithDetailsV5PagedRequest.AvailableFrom.
Employees with any assignment or absence overlapping the window are excluded.

parameters.name: ExcludeEmployeeId
parameters.description: Employee ID to exclude from the result set.
